name: MBD4 × ATRi IC50 protocol
what_it_solves: Wet-lab protocol design for validating the MBD4/ATR SL axis in cell lines.
how_it_solves: Step-by-step IC50 protocol targeting the specific MBD4-LOF vs WT contrast the computational evidence could not resolve.
why_it_exists: The computational modality cells cannot deconfound MBD4 from MSI-H — wet-lab is the only path to STRONG tier for this axis.
gaps_still_open: Protocol authored but not executed as of the receipt snapshot.
